title: laelia × oaxacana
intro: Laelia × oaxacana is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between the species Laelia tenebrosa and the species Oaaxacana. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Laelia × oaxacana include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, this plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in tinctures and decoctions.
